title: Make mutations atomic and durable
description: Each successful Ledger mutation is durable as one logical change; validation, storage, crash, integrity, and resource failures fail closed without partial domain state.
target: For every injected failure point, restart inspection observes either the complete committed mutation exactly once or the unchanged pre-operation state, with zero partial entities or relationships.
load_condition: All public writes, including multi-entity corrections, relationship replacement, restore activation, and storage evolution.
measurement: Automated fault-injection and restart tests at each persistence boundary, followed by integrity, count, relationship, and exact-total checks.
rationale: Partial writes can silently corrupt financial meaning and recovery. Supports G2, G4, G7, and G8.
